description: Safely modifies Xcode projects (.pbxproj) to add Swift Packages and link files. Use this skill whenever an iOS project needs dependencies installed (e.g. Firebase, Alamofire).
representativeQueries: Add Firebase to my iOS project
Set up Swift Package dependencies in Xcode
How do I link frameworks to an Xcode project?
Configure SPM packages for iOS development
Fix Firebase linker errors in Xcode
